environment.storeConfig: CORRECTED 2026-04-27: agent claim of anonymousUsersAllowed=false was WRONG. Verified via Platform API GET /api/stores/B2B-store: Stores.AllowAnonymousUsers=true, XOrder.CreateAnonymousOrderEnabled=true. Direct HTTP GET /cart returns 200 to guest. Actual blocker is unidentified — possibly leftover session in Edge MCP profile or a client-side vc-frontend route guard. Re-investigation needed.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Happy Path
results.notes: BLOCKED: Store has anonymousUsersAllowed=false configured. Guest users navigating to /cart are redirected to /sign-in?returnUrl=/cart. Quantity stepper on PDP is disabled for unauthenticated users (increaseBtnDisabled=true confirmed). No 'Add to cart' text visible for guest. Store does not permit anonymous shopping. This entire suite is blocked by store configuration — not a test gap.

results.title: Guest Checkout - New Address Entry
results.notes: BLOCKED: Depends on CHK-014. anonymousUsersAllowed=false prevents guest from reaching checkout. Cannot test address entry.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Track Order
results.notes: N/A: Feature not implemented. /orders/track returns 404. Guest order tracking page does not exist in current storefront. Explicitly documented in test preconditions as 'Do not execute'.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Prompt Registration After Purchase
results.notes: BLOCKED: Depends on CHK-014. anonymousUsersAllowed=false prevents guest checkout completion.

results.title: Guest Checkout - With Coupon Code
results.notes: BLOCKED: Two blockers: (1) anonymousUsersAllowed=false prevents guest cart access; (2) VALID_COUPON_CODE env var not set.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Field Validation
results.notes: BLOCKED: Depends on CHK-014. Cannot reach checkout form for guest.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Register After Purchase
results.notes: BLOCKED: Depends on CHK-014. Cannot reach post-purchase registration prompt.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Anonymous Users Not Allowed Configuration
results.notes: N/A: This test verifies the behavior WHEN anonymousUsersAllowed=false — which is the current QA store configuration. The redirect-to-sign-in behavior has been observed and confirmed (Edge guest navigated to /cart, received redirect to /sign-in?returnUrl=/cart). This is expected behavior. However, since the entire suite is blocked by this config, this case is moot.

results.title: Guest Checkout - Invalid Email Format Validation
results.notes: BLOCKED: Depends on CHK-014. Cannot reach email input step for guest checkout.

environmentFindings.description: ORIGINAL CLAIM (WRONG): QA store has anonymousUsersAllowed=false. CORRECTION 2026-04-27: Verified via Platform API admin GET /api/stores/B2B-store — Stores.AllowAnonymousUsers=true, XOrder.CreateAnonymousOrderEnabled=true, XPurchase.IsSelectedForCheckout=true. Direct curl GET https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/cart returns HTTP 200 to unauthenticated session. The store DOES allow anonymous users. The redirect-to-/sign-in observed by the sub-agent must come from another source (leftover Edge MCP session cookies, vc-frontend client-side route guard, or other guard) — not the store-level allow-anonymous flag.
environmentFindings.recommendation: Re-run Suite 012 in a verified-clean private MCP context (clear all cookies/storage, fresh browser instance). If redirect persists, inspect the storefront route guards in vc-frontend (e.g., /shared/account, /pages/cart.vue beforeEach hooks) and file a bug. Do NOT close as 'works as configured' until the actual root cause is identified.

notes: Suite 012 results require re-investigation. Sub-agent classification of 'anonymousUsersAllowed=false' has been refuted by direct admin API + HTTP verification. CHK-016 and CHK-021 remain N/A per their own preconditions. CHK-014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 029 should be re-run in a clean private context.
